messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao Google Cloud para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Cloud VPN → OCI VPN IPSec

### Mapeamento

| GCP | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| Cloud VPN | VPN IPSec |
| HA VPN | DRG + 2x IPSec |

### OCI VPN IPSec

- Site-to-site VPN
- DRG (Dynamic Routing Gateway)
- BGP or static routing

### Terraform

```hcl
resource "oci_core_cpe" "cpe" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  ip_address     = "203.0.113.10"
}

resource "oci_network_ipsec_connection" "vpn" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  cpe_id        = oci_core_cpe.cpe.id
  drg_id        = oci_core_drg.drg.id
  static_routes = ["10.0.0.0/16"]
}
```

### HA VPN

- Two connections recommended
- BGP for failover
- SLA 99.9% com HA
